Here is a good one:

<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
tool_name:「始」good「末」,
arg:「始」ok「末」
<<<[END_TOOL_REQUEST]>>>

And here's one that forgot the tool_name:

<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
only_arg:「始」no tool_name「末」
<<<[END_TOOL_REQUEST]>>>

And finally an unterminated envelope at the end:

<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
tool_name:「始」dangling「末」,
note:「始」never closes
